content.en:
The Lord of the Dust Spirit was very aware of the strength of the Black Abyss Giant Ape, if it was in the outside world, he would not pay attention to it at all, and he could stab it to death with one finger.

However, in this special treasure land, his strength in the Nine Bone Transformation Realm could not defeat this Black Abyss Giant Ape.

If he didn't escape, even if he could save his life, but these elders of the Xuanling Sect had all fallen, and the Guheng Mountain Venerable Envoy brought by Ye Tian had also fallen.

In case Ye Tian falls, then the Xuanling Sect will be miserable!

"It's okay!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and then he walked towards the Black Abyss Giant Ape.

The Lord of Dust Spirit's face changed, and he wanted to stop it, but it was too late.

But.

He didn't dare to go anymore, if Ye Tian was in danger, he had to go up to the rescue!

He knew that Ye Tian was a genius on the other side of Gu Heng Mountain, but in this special treasure land, once he could not mobilize his immeasurable will, it would be difficult to exert even the magic skills on the other side, and his combat effectiveness would be very weak.

Therefore, Ye Tian may also fall!

But soon, he was no longer worried.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body was filled with countless golden lights, enveloping his whole body.

This is him doing his best to stimulate the golden body on the other side.

Even though the immeasurable will was sealed, he still relied on his physical instinct to burst out some of the power of the golden body on the other side.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian and the Black Abyss Giant Ape fought together, and the two sides collided directly.

I saw that the Black Abyss Giant Ape was directly hit and flew out, and his whole body was cracking.

"The Golden Mangs on the other side!"

A faint golden light erupted in Ye Tian's hand, and a finger immediately pierced through the body of the Black Abyss Giant Ape.

Soon, the Black Abyss Giant Ape was killed by him.

"Your Excellency is invincible!"

The Lord of Dust exclaimed.

If he hadn't guessed wrong, the golden body of the Endless Lord on the other side would have been fully transformed, and it would be many times more powerful than the Lord of the Ancient Void and the Lord of the True Extreme.

He had never seen a genius with a golden body on the other side!

With this combination of the supernatural powers of the other side, wouldn't it be a direct beating of other other shore-level geniuses!

"The Endless Lord of Gu Heng Mountain is too demonic, no wonder his reputation has been very loud recently, and his growth rate is too fast, fortunately he didn't care about the Lord of the Yuan Capital, otherwise just relying on the Endless Lord's own strength can destroy our Xuanling Sect!"

The Lord of the Dust Spirits said secretly.

......

After killing this Black Abyss Giant Ape, Ye Tian did not continue to explore.

"Although there are not many resources in this treasure land at the moment, it is indeed very interesting, and you can use it to sharpen your combat effectiveness when the time comes. "

"I will report it to Gu Heng Mountain, if there is no accident, I can let you join Gu Heng Mountain!"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, Lord Lord!" said the Lord of the Dust Spirit and the elders of the Xuanling Sect excitedly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left from here and returned to Guheng Mountain.

Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian told the Lord of Eternal Zero about this matter, but the Lord of Eternal Zero did not show up and agreed directly.

After all, this is just a small matter, and Ye Tian can make the decision himself.

That's it.

The Xuanling Sect joined Gu Heng Mountain and became one of the subordinate forces under Gu Heng Mountain.

And Gu Hengshan also announced the news to the outside world.

In this way, the hostile forces of the Xuanling Sect would not attack the Xuanling Sect, otherwise they would not give Gu Hengshan face.

In this area of the Blood Yan Domain, Gu Heng Mountain, Gu Demon Sea, True Beast Alliance, and Taidu Realm are the four overlords who deserve to be, so the other forces still dare not offend these four overlord forces.

After the Xuanling Sect joined Guheng Mountain, that special treasure land also belonged to Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian sent several envoys and some patrol envoys to garrison here, and he himself entered here, preparing to go in and explore.

He always felt that this treasure land was not simple, and maybe there were very rare treasure resources in it!

At present, the other high-level leaders of Gu Heng Mountain still don't understand the value here, and the powerhouses of the Xuanling Sect don't have the strength to enter the inner perimeter to explore.

So, this is his chance.

After the special treasure land.

Ye Tian entered here again, and then went directly to the depths of the treasure land.

Along.

He encountered one creature after another, and he slew them all.

Of course.

The closer you get to the depths, the more powerful the creatures you encounter, and there are quite a few creatures comparable to the Black Abyss Giant Ape.

Soon, he came to the inner area of this treasure land.

Suddenly.

A black mist dragon appears.

Ye Tian fought with him, but was soon beaten.

The power of this black mist dragon is very strong, and the key is that it can cancel out the attack power.

And Ye Tian's immeasurable will was sealed, and his strength could not be exerted, just relying on the golden body on the other side and the golden body on the other side that could not exert his power, he could not kill the other party at all.

He sensed that special creatures were coming, and he immediately left.

......

"No wonder the Eight Bone Transformation Realms of the Xuanling Sect broke into the inner enclosure and died, even if they didn't enter the inner enclosure, if they encountered the Black Abyss Giant Ape, they would be killed, and when they reached the inner enclosure, the Lord of the Dust Spirit would have to fall!" Ye Tian thought.

Still, he had to go in and find resources.

If you are on the periphery, there will definitely be no benefit, and it is estimated that there are some resources, and they will also be taken away by the Xuanling Sect.

"On my own, it is indeed difficult to enter this treasure land, unless I can break the rules of this treasure land and exert the power of immeasurable will, otherwise I can only use another way!"

The method that Ye Tian thought of was to use the ability of the copying talent to copy the body of a Black Abyss Giant Ape and act here with the body of the Black Abyss Giant Ape.

So.

He can also raise the body of the Black Abyss Giant Ape and exert the power of the supernatural power on the other side, and he can beat those Black Mist Dragons.

"Copy!"

The body of a black abyss giant ape was quickly copied.

And then.

Ye Tian used the body of the Black Abyss Giant Ape to cultivate, mastered the Ancient Technique, and the Divine Power of the Other Side, making the strength of this replicating body skyrocket wildly.

And.

The replica body of this Black Abyss Giant Ape can indeed exert the power of will, but the power of will is also very weak, but at least it can be used!

Then, he used the Black Abyss Giant Ape to copy the body and went to the inner area of this treasure land.

After a while, he encountered a black mist dragon again.

But this black mist dragon did not attack Ye Tian, but drove Ye Tian away.

Obviously, it is showing that this is its territory, and Ye Tian is not allowed to come over.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian shot directly, and used the magic power of the other side to directly burst the body of the black mist dragon, blowing it up again and again.

Soon, the Black Mist Dragon was completely killed.

"Let's see if there's anything good around here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
